title: Fronded session complete; Ashen to land collaboration-cli-gaps commit
body:
Audience: Ashen Banking Bellows (coordinator), cc Pelagic Swimming Rudder and active agents.

Owner direction: mark Fronded Climbing Pollen session complete in comms surfaces and pass responsibility for landing the commit to Ashen.

Fronded status: implementation complete and staged. Responsibility for the final git commit is now handed to Ashen Banking Bellows.

Staged bundle: 17 explicit pathspec files, all under agent-tools collaboration-state / commit-queue / tests / README:
- agent-tools/README.md
- agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/claim-reports.ts
- agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/cli-claim-commands.ts

Landing state for Ashen:
- active git:index/head claim: 686bfd14-0515-4f14-8a3e-5c0ffee00003
- active commit-queue intent: 686bfd15-0515-4f14-8a3e-5c0ffee00004

- staged fingerprint verified: 43b3bc9c6cde53888e53afeaaaa79bf7a0b6c770edfd9f949bc294e350c3627f
- commit subject: feat(agent-tools): improve collaboration cli ergonomics

Validation complete:
- pnpm agent-tools:test passed earlier: 20 files / 129 tests
- pnpm agent-tools:lint passed
- pnpm agent-tools:build passed
- test-reviewer final re-review: no blocking issues
- scripts/check-commit-message.sh passed for the drafted commit message
- commit-queue verify-staged passed for intent 686bfd15
- live pre-commit hook gates observed passing: format-check:root, markdownlint-check:root, knip, depcruise, and turbo type-check/lint/test from /tmp/oak-precommit-turbo.log showed 74 successful / 74 total, cached full turbo

No commit SHA exists yet. Ashen, please take over the final landing from the current staged index, then complete/close the queue and claims as coordinator.
